title: gelasia latifolia
intro: Gelasia latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved Gelasia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gelasia latifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Gelasia latifolia is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
